options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: grouping
options.description:
Universal: Every Item pickup increases fills a progress bar which gives location checks.

Stages (NYI): Each stage will have location checks within each map variant on a given stage.
Stages will be locked in the item pool until received.

Maps: Each map will have location checks within each map on said stage.
Both maps and stages will be locked in the item pool until received. asdkfjas;dlkf

options.name: total_locations
options.description:
Number of location checks which are added to the Risk of Rain playthrough.
On stage or map grouping, will determine how many locations checks are added per stage/map.

options.name: progressive_stages
options.description: Changes stage items to be progressive.

options.name: require_stage
options.description:
Add Stage items to the pool that blocks maps of the type
Does nothing unless on map grouping

options.name: stage_five_tp
options.description: Only allow access to teleport to final stage if on stage 5, like RoR2

options.name: strict_stage_prog
options.description:
Require both the prior stage and any corresponding map before having access to later stages
Ex. You won't be able to access Stage 3 until you have Stage 2 and either Stage 2 map

options.name: required_frags
options.description: Percentage of teleporter fragments required to access the final stage

options.name: available_frags
options.description: Percentage of filler items to be replaced with teleporter fragments

options.name: item_pickup_step
options.description:
Number of items to pick up before an AP Check is completed.
Setting to 1 means every other pickup.
Setting to 2 means every third pickup. So on...

options.name: enable_trap
options.description: Allows Trap items in the item pool.

options.name: common_item
options.description:
Weight of common items in the item pool.

(Ignored unless Item Weight Presets is 'No')

options.name: uncommon_item
options.description:
Weight of uncommon items in the item pool.

(Ignored unless Item Weight Presets is 'No')

options.name: legendary_item
options.description:
Weight of legendary items in the item pool.

(Ignored unless Item Weight Presets is 'No')

options.name: boss_item
options.description:
Weight of boss items in the item pool.

(Ignored unless Item Weight Presets is 'No')

options.name: equipment
options.description:
Weight of equipment items in the item pool.

(Ignored unless Item Weight Presets is 'No')

options.name: money
options.description:
Weight of money items in the item pool.

(Ignored unless Item Weight Presets is 'No')

options.name: experience
options.description:
Weight of 1000 exp items in the item pool.

(Ignored unless Item Weight Presets is 'No')

options.name: time_warp_trap
options.description:
Weight of time warp trap items in the item pool.

(Ignored unless Item Weight Presets is 'No')

options.name: combat_trap
options.description:
Weight of combat trap items in the item pool.

(Ignored unless Item Weight Presets is 'No')

options.name: meteor_trap
options.description:
Weight of meteor trap items in the item pool.

(Ignored unless Item Weight Presets is 'No')

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
